basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Project Technical Support III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Three Years Graduate in relevant subject/field + three years' experience or PG in relevant subject/field (Forensic Science/Life Science/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Computational Biology). Desirable - Experience of working in molecular biology laboratory
qualification.details: Project Technical Support III: Three Years Graduate in relevant subject/field + three years' experience or PG in relevant subject/field (Forensic Science/Life Science/Genetics/Biotechnology/Bioinformatics/Computational Biology). Desirable - Experience of working in molecular biology laboratory.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per ICMR project salary norms
salary_details.details: As per ICMR project salary norms

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Technical Support III position is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support III?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Three Years Graduate degree in a relevant subject/field with three years of experience, or a PG degree in a relevant subject/field like Forensic Science, Life Science, Genetics, Biotechnology, Bioinformatics, or Computational Biology.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of three years of experience is required if you have a Graduate degree. Experience in a molecular biology laboratory is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Project Technical Support III?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Technical Support III position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Project Technical Support III post.
